mapper.sql: SELECT T.PARAM_NO, T.DISTINCT_FIELD, T.DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND, T.PARAM_ITEM_NO, T.DEFAULT_VAL, PI.PARAM_ITEM_ID, SY3.CONTENT AS ALIAS_NAME, T.CPNY_ID, T.CPNY_ID AS CPNY_NAME, SY1.CONTENT AS DISTINCT_FIELD_NAME, SY2.CONTENT AS DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND_NAME, PI.ITEM_TYPE, T.ACTIVITY FROM PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM T, PA_PARAM_ITEM PI, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY1, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY2, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY3, PA_DISTINCT_LIST PA1, PA_DISTINCT_LIST PA2 WHERE T.PARAM_ITEM_NO = PI.PARAM_ITEM_NO AND T.DISTINCT_FIELD = PA1.DISTINCT_FIELD(+) AND T.CPNY_ID = PA1.CPNY_ID(+) AND PA1.ID = SY1.NO(+) AND SY1.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND = PA2.DISTINCT_FIELD(+) AND T.CPNY_ID = PA2.CPNY_ID(+) AND PA2.ID = SY2.NO(+) AND SY2.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PARAM_ITEM_NO = SY3.NO(+) AND SY3.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PI.ACTIVITY = 1 AND T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

sql.if: AND (PI.PARAM_ITEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{aliasNameSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR SY3.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{aliasNameSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT T.PARAM_NO, T.DISTINCT_FIELD, T.DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND, T.PARAM_ITEM_NO, T.DEFAULT_VAL, PI.PARAM_ITEM_ID, SY3.CONTENT AS ALIAS_NAME, T.CPNY_ID, T.CPNY_ID AS CPNY_NAME, PI.ITEM_TYPE, T.ACTIVITY FROM PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM T, PA_PARAM_ITEM PI, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY3 WHERE T.PARAM_ITEM_NO = PI.PARAM_ITEM_NO AND T.PARAM_ITEM_NO = SY3.NO(+) AND SY3.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM SET DISTINCT_FIELD = #{distinctField, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND = #{distinctField2nd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEFAULT_VAL = #{defaultVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT T.ID, T.DISTINCT_FIELD, SY.CONTENT AS DISTINCT_FIELD_NAME, T.TABLE_NAME FROM PA_DISTINCT_LIST T, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY WHERE T.ID = SY.NO(+) AND SY.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.TABLE_NAME = 'PA_HR_V' AND T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PARAM_FLAG = '1' ORDER BY T.ORDERNO, T.ID
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
